titleStmt.title: SII 19.318: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 318. (A.R. No. 320 of 1906.) TIRUMĀLPURAM, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of land, 1462(1/2) kuḻi in extent, by Kōyil Kaṇṇapirāṭṭi wife of the chief Śāttan Kālaṉ Vē[ḷāṉ] [Ādl]tyaṉ alias Mīnavaṉ Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Pullāli, for the daily expenses of the ardha-yāma service in the temple of the Gōvindapāḍi-Niṉṟaruḷiṉa-Perumānaḍigaḷ. This land is stated to have been situated in the dēvadāna-brahmadēya village Śiṟṟiyāṟṟūr belonging to the sabhā of Nallimaṅgalam and purchased out of the share owned by Vishṇuchandra Bhūtikramavittaṉ a member of the gaṇam, his brother and their sister-in-law. The mention of the chief makes the inscription assignable to Uttama-Chōḷa. (Vide. S.I.I. Vol. III No. 142).
Within the body of the inscription are two panels, one containing in relief the figures of two warriors, and the other the figures of a warrior and a woman.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pparakesarivarmmaṟki yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu lappāṭi pullālic cāttaṅ kālaṉ ve
Ātityaṉāṉ minavanmuventaveḷān maṇavāṭṭiy koyil kaṇṇapirāṭṭiy śrīgovindapāṭiy
mānaṭikaḷukku Arddhayāman=tiruvamutu ceyvataṟkup paḻavarici nāṉāḻiyum neyyamutu
tu nāḻiyuṅ kaṟiyamutiraṇṭum Aṭaikkāyamutañcum veṟṟilaiyamutāraṭukkumāka vippaṭi
śandrāditya Amu ṟku vaiytta nilamāvatu maṇaiyiṟkkoṭṭattu melpa rnāṭṭu nallimaṅka
lamyāḷu[ mga] ṇattāru kā viṣṇucandrapūtikramavittaṉum Ivaṉ tampiy ciṟuvaṭikramavittanumivan tampiy maticūtakramavittan brahmaṇi
Ammātinaṅkaic cānikku Ivaḷ maittunan Ivviṣṇucandrapūtikramavittaṉ mutukaṇṇākavu mi nakku viṟṟut tanta nilam Innallimaṅ
kalam yāḷum sabhaiyār devadā deyamākap peṟṟuṭaiya ciṟṟiyāṟṟūr rāja kesarivatikku meṟku śrīgarbhavāykkālukku vaṭakku kiḻakkuniṉ
ṟum nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟukkut niṉṟum muṉṟāñcatukkattum nālāñcatukkattumāka Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Aṟupattiraṇṭaraik kuḻiyum nān
vilaike 4 10 śrī gāvindapāṭi niṉṟaruḷina perumānaṭikaḷukkuk kuṭut teṉ koyil kaṇṇapirāṭṭiyen Itu śrī vaiṣṇavarirakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.318 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
